title: Bombay High Court to order takedown of content infringing personality rights of actor Kartik Aaryan
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday said that it will order takedown of online content infringing the personality rights of Bollywood actor Kartik Aaryan including unauthorised commercial exploitation of his name and image in the digital space [Kartik Aaryan v. Vinsm Globe Private Limited & Ors.].Justice Sharmila Deshmukh said she will pass an order to that effect.This was after Aaryan's lawyer, Senior Counsel Birendra Saraf, flagged such content some of which he alleged were scandalous and s
